channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree needs pruning, 3rd May
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Chase, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree vandalised, 3rd May
item.description:
Large tree on the grass in King and Queen Close has had nails hammered into it and the bark stripped off
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King and Queen Close, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street scar, 3rd May
item.description:
UK Power Networks have removed all the proper sets/bricks and thrown down cheap tarmac. Parking space delineation no longer clear. Can they come back and restore properly.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disused newspaper box, 3rd May
item.description:
Box for closed newspaper being used as bin. Can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nitrous Oxide canisters, 3rd May
item.description:
Dumped on the pavement on Stanhope Grove by the railings for David Lloyd's.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Stanhope Grove, Upper Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Thorny weeds, pavement requires weeding and cleaning., 3rd May
item.description:
Thorny weeds, pavement requires weeding and cleaning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hillcrest Road, Sundridge, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping of household rubbish. See photo., 3rd May
item.description:
Fly tipping of household rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hillview Road, Chislehurst
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Van parked on double yellow lines, 3rd May
item.description:
Persistence van parked on double yellow lines. This van often returns and illegally parks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carriage Drive, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling, 3rd May
item.description:
Repeated issues of dog walkers allowing their dog to foul on my driveway and having doggy bags thrown on my driveway as seen in image. Having this problem since 2024 which I did inform Bexley council who put stencils but unfortunately they have worn off.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Midhurst Hill, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bad flytip possibly house clearance, 3rd May
item.description:
Food, furniture, clothing, mictowave etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 174, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on pavement, 3rd May
item.description:
People have been adding rubbish and furniture to bed and boxes left out for bulky waste collection on 30/4 Collection was only partially fulfilled. it is starting to block the entire pavement because people are adding stuff every day since then. Please can you remove as it’s becoming a hazard! We have also flagged it with the bulky waste/environmental team but not had a response yet.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coll's Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking Clapton terrace, 3rd May
item.description:
We continue. To have issues with illegal parking on our street which inhibits access for several vehicles. The council needs to do something by about the volume of illegal parking in the area and total lack of road saftely

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken swing, 3rd May
item.description:
This round swing in the playground at Beckenham place park has been vandalised so that the seat is half out and no longer functions

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravenbourne Estate, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights out, 3rd May
item.description:
Street lights out at the top of the car park on the northern side of Westcombe Park station.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ormiston Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole gap, 3rd May
item.description:
There is a raised and uneven manhole cover set into the pavement on Greenwich Church Street. The surrounding surface is poorly finished and creates a serious trip hazard. This area gets extremely crowded every weekend (near local cafés and shops), with many families, children, elderly people, and prams. The defect makes it difficult and unsafe to pass, especially for: • elderly pedestrians • parents with pushchairs • wheelchair and mobility scooter users I have personally seen people struggle to navigate around it, and there is a high risk of someone falling and getting injured. This needs urgent inspection and repair to level the surface and make it safe.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich Church Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Already reported tent is still there and the place is squalid, 3rd May
item.description:
Evidence of drug use

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queen Elizabeths Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox on Merriman Road, 3rd May
item.description:
There is a dead fox on Merriman Road, on the corner of Galsworthy Crescent, it is on the pavement and attracting a lot of flies already.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Merriman Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 113, 3rd May
item.description:
Extreme damage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped in the green, 3rd May
item.description:
Please remove the monstrosity someone left in our beautiful green space

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Langbrook Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass bank requires litter sweep, 3rd May
item.description:
Area constantly grubby and neglected by Greenwich council. Needs more frequent cleaning due to volume of people using.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kidbrooke Park Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet
